---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Set { #json2vec.Set }

```python
Set()
```

Multi-label set tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Set.type) |  |
| [max_vocab_size](#json2vec.Set.max_vocab_size) |  |
| [p_unavailable](#json2vec.Set.p_unavailable) |  |
| [threshold](#json2vec.Set.threshold) |  |
